topics.title: User Interface Enhancements
topics.summary: PR #1672 introduces a multi-select feature on the search page, allowing users to select multiple packages for bulk actions. This enhancement includes a persistent selection counter, a floating action bar, and improved accessibility, significantly improving user experience during package comparisons.

topics.title: Localization Updates
topics.summary: The recent merge of PR #2104 addresses synchronization issues in the `pt-BR` locale file, ensuring it aligns with the base `en.json` structure. This update enhances consistency and reduces future discrepancies, benefiting contributors by streamlining localization efforts.

topics.title: Feature Requests and User Feedback
topics.summary: The closure of Issue #1509 highlights user feedback regarding the need for a package comparison feature directly from search results. Users expressed a desire for a more efficient way to compare packages, akin to a shopping experience, enhancing the platform's usability.
